title: Roasted Irish Duck Leg
description: A classic dish featuring the rich flavors of roasted duck leg, served with a side of roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: 1 cup roasted vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, potatoes, and parsnips

instructions: Rinse the duck leg and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the duck leg with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the duck leg until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the duck leg to a roasting pan and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F (160°C) and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the duck leg rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Toss the roasted vegetables with olive oil, salt, and pepper, and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
